findings.description: Back-import from sibling behavioral module: marketmind.pipeline.layer3_technical (lines 10-12). PICA §3.1 Rule 3 prohibits imports from sibling behavioral modules. Imports from session_context (shared data) and gateway.async_client (different layer) are compliant.
findings.remediation: ACCEPTED AS TEMPORARY — this is a compatibility adapter by design. Per docstring: 'New callers should use layer3_technical directly.'
findings.acceptance_rationale: Compatibility adapter wrapping layer3_technical for the older interactive API.

findings.description: While loop (lines 51-73) is a user-interaction loop with clear exit conditions ('observe' → return False, '好'/'y'/'yes'/'continue'/'confirm'/'' → return True). No risk of infinite loop — exit is guaranteed on every iteration since both branches return.

summary: Single import boundary violation — back-import from layer3_technical (sibling behavioral module), accepted as intentional for compatibility adapter role. Control flow is safe (while loop always exits). Data flow is well-defined: ctx.selected_tickers → analyze_layer3 → batch → interactive Q&A → ctx.l3_result. Single entry point (run_l3_interactive) with clear inputs (SessionContext, cli_handler) and output (bool).
